ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the school is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the school */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the school's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_programs" (
  "school_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school program */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school that offers the program */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program offered by the school */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the program was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the program was ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_programs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_programs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_languages" (
  "school_language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school language */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school that uses the language */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language used by the school */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the language was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the language was ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_languages_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_languages_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, educator, researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_programs_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school for which the change was recorded */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program that was changed */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the program was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the program was ended */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change in program offerings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_programs_history_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_programs_history_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_languages_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school for which the change was recorded */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language that was changed */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the language was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the language was ended */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change in language used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_languages_history_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_languages_history_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)
